summary: Site Engineer Board Module - Complete testing of all APIs and UI. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with Materials and Labours tabs, request dialogs, and status tracking.
seed_data_creation: Test material and labour requests created during testing with TEST_ prefix in remarks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site Engineer Board module fully functional. Site Engineer (Vikram Singh) is assigned to 'Classic Condo' project. Material request workflow: Requested → Planning Approved → Procurement Approved → Accountant Approved → Ready for Delivery → Received. Labour request workflow: Requested → Planning Approved → Accountant Approved → Approved. Material receipt requires GPS location and OTP verification (MOCKED - test_otp shown in response when email not configured).

site_engineer_assignment_api.GET /api/site-engineer/assignments: PASS - Returns assignments with project/engineer details

site_engineer_dashboard_api.GET /api/site-engineer/project/{id}: PASS - Returns project detail with material/labour requests

material_request_api.PATCH procurement_approve: PASS - Procurement approval with pricing works

labour_request_api.POST /api/site-engineer/labour-requests: PASS - Creates labour request with total calculation

material_receipt_api.POST /api/site-engineer/material-receipt: PASS - Initiates receipt with GPS, generates OTP
PASS - Verifies OTP and completes receipt

labour_types_api.GET /api/site-engineer/labour-types: PASS - Returns 10 labour types (mason, helper, carpenter, etc.)

frontend_site_engineer_dashboard.page_loads: PASS - Site Engineer Board header displayed
frontend_site_engineer_dashboard.stats_cards: PASS - Assigned Projects, Active Orders, Active Sites displayed
frontend_site_engineer_dashboard.project_cards: PASS - Project cards with name, client, location, status, active orders
frontend_site_engineer_dashboard.navigation: PASS - Click project navigates to project detail

frontend_site_engineer_project.page_loads: PASS - Project header with details displayed
frontend_site_engineer_project.materials_tab: PASS - Materials tab with My Orders and Received sub-tabs
frontend_site_engineer_project.labours_tab: PASS - Labours tab with My Orders and Approved sub-tabs
frontend_site_engineer_project.request_material_dialog: PASS - Material select, quantity input, remarks, submit button
frontend_site_engineer_project.request_labour_dialog: PASS - Labour type select, workers/days/rate inputs, total calculation
frontend_site_engineer_project.receive_button: PASS - Receive button shown for accountant_approved materials
frontend_site_engineer_project.status_badges: PASS - Status badges with icons (Requested, Planning Approved, etc.)

mocked_apis.OTP_email: MOCKED - Resend API key not configured, test_otp shown in response

workflow_tested.material_request_flow: Requested → Planning Approved → Procurement Approved → Accountant Approved → Ready for Delivery → Received (Complete)
workflow_tested.labour_request_flow: Requested → Planning Approved → Accountant Approved → Approved
workflow_tested.material_receipt_flow: Initiate with GPS → OTP sent/shown → Verify OTP → Receipt Complete
